title: Start a new kiosk ordering session from the welcome screen
description: Verifies a walk-up customer can start an ordering session from the welcome screen and reach the menu catalog.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Start an order from the welcome screen
Verify the user lands on the menu catalog page

title: Browse menu and add a customized drink to the cart
description: Verifies a customer can browse the menu, customize a drink (size/sugar/ice/toppings), add it to the cart, and see the item with the selected customizations in the cart.

steps.description: Navigate to /menu
Open a product details or customization view from the product list
Select a size option
Select a sugar level option
Select an ice level option
Select at least one topping option
Add the customized item to the cart
Navigate to the cart page from the menu
Verify the cart displays the added item with the selected customization options

title: Queue status reflects kitchen updates to Ready
description: Verifies that when a barista marks an order as ready in the kitchen view, the same order appears as ready on the customer status board.

steps.description: Navigate to /kitchen
Wait for the orders list to finish loading
If no pending order exists, wait until at least one paid/pending order is visible
Mark a pending order as preparing
Mark the same order as ready
Navigate to /status
Wait for the queue list to finish loading
Verify the order that was marked ready is shown with ready status

title: Move an order from preparing to ready
description: Verifies that a barista can change an order’s state from preparing to ready and the UI reflects the new status grouping.

steps.description: Navigate to /kitchen
Wait for the orders list to finish loading
If no preparing order exists, mark a pending order as preparing
Mark a preparing order as ready
Verify the order is now shown in the ready section/grouping or no longer shown as preparing

title: Move an order from pending to preparing
description: Verifies that a barista can change an order’s state from pending to preparing and the UI reflects the new status grouping.

steps.description: Navigate to /kitchen
Wait for the orders list to finish loading
If no pending order exists, wait until at least one paid/pending order is visible
Mark a pending order as preparing
Verify the order is now shown in the preparing section/grouping

title: Initiate payment from checkout and reach a payment-in-progress state
description: Verifies a customer can initiate payment from checkout and the UI displays a payment state (such as QR code/instructions) without duplicating the initiation on rapid repeat clicks.

steps.description: Navigate to /menu
Add any product to the cart
Navigate to the cart page from the menu
Fill a valid customer name into the customer name field
Proceed to checkout
Initiate payment
Initiate payment again immediately
Verify the checkout shows a single payment-in-progress UI state (for example a single QR code/instruction area)

title: View pending and preparing orders in kitchen dashboard
description: Verifies that a barista can open the kitchen dashboard and see orders grouped by lifecycle status.

steps.description: Navigate to /kitchen
Wait for the orders list to finish loading
Verify orders are displayed in sections or groupings by status (such as pending and preparing)
Verify each displayed order shows identifying details needed to fulfill it (such as queue number and items)

title: Add two differently customized items and verify cart line items preserve options
description: Verifies a customer can add the same product twice with different customization selections and the cart preserves each line item’s selected options separately.

steps.description: Navigate to /menu
Open a product details or customization view from the product list
Select a first set of customization options (size, sugar, ice, and a topping)
Add the customized item to the cart
Return to the menu product list
Open the same product customization view again
Select a different set of customization options than the first item
Add the second customized item to the cart
Navigate to the cart page from the menu
Verify the cart shows two line items whose customization options differ and are preserved per item

title: See queue list and statuses update on the status board
description: Verifies that a customer can view the queue list on the status board and see at least one order change status after waiting/refreshing behavior.

steps.description: Navigate to /status
Wait for the queue list to finish loading
Wait for a polling interval long enough for the list to refresh
Verify the queue list with order numbers and statuses is displayed
Verify at least one order’s status changes between refreshes

title: Update cart quantities and verify totals recalculate
description: Verifies a customer can increase and decrease item quantity in the cart and the displayed totals update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /menu
Add any product to the cart
Navigate to the cart page from the menu
Increase the quantity of the cart item by 1
Decrease the quantity of the cart item by 1
Verify the cart totals are updated to match the current quantity

title: Checkout is blocked until customer name is provided
description: Verifies a customer cannot proceed to checkout from the cart without entering a customer name, then can proceed after entering a valid name.

steps.description: Navigate to /menu
Add any product to the cart
Navigate to the cart page from the menu
Attempt to proceed to checkout without entering a customer name
Fill a valid customer name into the customer name field
Proceed to checkout
Verify the user lands on the checkout page

title: Remove an item from the cart and see the updated cart state
description: Verifies a customer can remove an item from the cart and the cart updates to reflect the removal.

steps.description: Navigate to /menu
Add any product to the cart
Navigate to the cart page from the menu
Remove the cart item
Verify the cart no longer lists the removed item

title: Admin can log in and view dashboard sales and sync controls
description: Verifies that an operations user can log in to the admin area and reach the dashboard where daily sales data and sync controls are visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Fill in the admin username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the admin password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit credentials
Wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Verify daily sales data is displayed
Verify sync controls are visible and enabled for interaction

title: Admin login shows error for incorrect credentials
description: Verifies that entering incorrect admin credentials shows an authentication error and does not navigate to the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Fill in the admin username field with invalid-user@example.com
Fill in the admin password field with wrong-password
Submit credentials
Verify an authentication error is visible
Verify the user remains on the admin login page

title: Status board handles empty state when no orders are present
description: Verifies that the status board shows a clear empty state when there are no orders to display.

steps.description: Navigate to /status
Wait for the queue list area to finish loading
Verify either a queue list is displayed or an empty state message is visible
Verify the page remains usable without broken layout or stuck loading state

title: Prevent rapid duplicate status updates on a single order
description: Verifies that rapidly attempting to change the same order’s status multiple times does not result in duplicated or inconsistent UI state for that order.

steps.description: Navigate to /kitchen
Wait for the orders list to finish loading
If no pending order exists, wait until at least one paid/pending order is visible
Click the control to mark the same pending order as preparing twice in quick succession
Verify the order appears only once in the preparing section and not duplicated across sections

title: Admin dashboard is accessible directly without login (no-auth configuration)
description: Verifies that when authentication is not required, navigating directly to the admin dashboard loads the dashboard content without forcing a login.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/dashboard
Wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Verify daily sales data is displayed
Verify sync controls are visible and enabled for interaction
